#### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts](index.md 'index')
### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Results](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Results.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Results')

## DomainResult Class

Wraps the result of a domain service command processing\. Contains an immutable list of
[IEventPayload](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Events.IEventPayload.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Events\.IEventPayload') instances representing success events, rejection events, or no\-op\.
Mixed results \(both regular and rejection events\) are invalid and rejected at construction\.

```csharp
public record DomainResult : System.IEquatable<Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Results.DomainResult>
```
